aura_env.compMap = {
    "Caster Cleave",
    "Melee Cleave",
    "Caster/Melee"
}

aura_env.CanSpec = function(talentName)
    local configID = C_ClassTalents.GetActiveConfigID()
    local configInfo = C_Traits.GetConfigInfo(configID)
    
    for _, treeID in ipairs(configInfo.treeIDs) do
        local nodes = C_Traits.GetTreeNodes(treeID)
        for i, nodeID in ipairs(nodes) do
            local nodeInfo = C_Traits.GetNodeInfo(configID, nodeID)
            for _, entryID in ipairs(nodeInfo.entryIDs) do
                local entryInfo = C_Traits.GetEntryInfo(configID, entryID)
                if entryInfo and entryInfo.definitionID then
                    local definition = C_Traits.GetDefinitionInfo(entryInfo.definitionID)
                    local spellInfo = GetSpellInfo(definition.spellID)
                    if spellInfo == talentName then
                        return true
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    for _, pvpTalentID in pairs(C_SpecializationInfo.GetPvpTalentSlotInfo(1).availableTalentIDs) do
        local pvpTalentInfo = C_SpecializationInfo.GetPvpTalentInfo(pvpTalentID)
        if pvpTalentInfo.name == talentName then return true end
    end
    return false
end

aura_env.IsSpecced = function(talentName)
    local configID = C_ClassTalents.GetActiveConfigID()
    local configInfo = C_Traits.GetConfigInfo(configID)
    
    for _, treeID in ipairs(configInfo.treeIDs) do
        local nodes = C_Traits.GetTreeNodes(treeID)
        for i, nodeID in ipairs(nodes) do
            local nodeInfo = C_Traits.GetNodeInfo(configID, nodeID)
            for _, entryID in ipairs(nodeInfo.entryIDsWithCommittedRanks) do
                local entryInfo = C_Traits.GetEntryInfo(configID, entryID)
                if entryInfo and entryInfo.definitionID then
                    local definition = C_Traits.GetDefinitionInfo(entryInfo.definitionID)
                    local spellInfo = GetSpellInfo(definition.spellID)
                    if spellInfo == talentName then
                        return true
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    for _, pvpTalentID in pairs(C_SpecializationInfo.GetAllSelectedPvpTalentIDs()) do
        local pvpTalentInfo = C_SpecializationInfo.GetPvpTalentInfo(pvpTalentID)
        if pvpTalentInfo.name == talentName then return true end
    end
    return false
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if event == "OPTIONS" or event == "ARENA_PREP_OPPONENT_SPECIALIZATIONS" then
        NotifyInspect("party1")
        NotifyInspect("party2")
    end
    
    local _
    local i
    
    local classGroup = aura_env.config["classGroup"]
    if classGroup then
        for i=1, #classGroup do
            local talentName = classGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local classID = aura_env.classMap[classGroup[i]["class"]]
                local should = classGroup[i]["should"]
                local className = GetClassInfo(classID)
                local classFound = false
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                
                for i=1,GetNumArenaOpponentSpecs() do
                    if GetClassIDFromSpecID(GetArenaOpponentSpec(i)) == classID then
                        classFound = true
                    end
                end
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    classFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and classFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. className .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and classFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. className .. " but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local specGroup = aura_env.config["specGroup"]
    if specGroup then
        for i=1, #specGroup do
            local talentName = specGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local specID = aura_env.specMap[specGroup[i]["spec"]]
                local should = specGroup[i]["should"]
                local _, specName = GetSpecializationInfoByID(specID)
                local specFound = false
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                
                for i=1,GetNumArenaOpponentSpecs() do
                    if GetArenaOpponentSpec(i) == specID then
                        specFound = true
                    end
                end
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    specFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and specFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. specName .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and specFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. specName .. " but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    
    local compTypeGroup = aura_env.config["compTypeGroup"]
    local isTest = event == "OPTIONS"
    local isThrees = compTypeGroup and GetNumArenaOpponents() == 3 and C_PvP.IsSoloShuffle() == false
    if isTest or isThrees then
        for i=1, #compTypeGroup do
            local talentName = compTypeGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local compID = compTypeGroup[i]["compType"]
                local should = compTypeGroup[i]["should"]
                local compFound = false
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                local numMelee = 0
                local numCasters = 0
                
                for i=1,GetNumArenaOpponentSpecs() do
                    if aura_env.melee[GetArenaOpponentSpec(i)] then
                        numMelee = numMelee + 1
                    elseif aura_env.casters[GetArenaOpponentSpec(i)] then
                        numCasters = numCasters + 1
                    end
                end
                
                if numCasters == 2 then
                    compFound = compID == 1
                elseif numMelee == 2 then
                    compFound = compID == 2
                elseif numMelee == 1 and numCasters == 1 then
                    compFound = compID == 3
                end
                
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    compFound = true 
                end
                
                local compName = aura_env.compMap[compID]
                if should == 1 and compFound and not spellFound then    
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. compName .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and compFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. compName .. " but have " .. talentName
                end
            end    
        end
    end
    
    local mapGroup = aura_env.config["mapGroup"]
    if mapGroup then
        for i=1, #mapGroup do
            local talentName = mapGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local instanceID = aura_env.mapMap[mapGroup[i]["map"]]
                local should = mapGroup[i]["should"]
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                local mapName, _, _, _, _, _, _, currentInstanceID = GetInstanceInfo()
                local mapFound = instanceID == currentInstanceID
                
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    mapFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and mapFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. mapName .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and mapFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. mapName .. " but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local arenaTypeGroup = aura_env.config["arenaTypeGroup"]
    if arenaTypeGroup then
        for i=1, #arenaTypeGroup do
            local talentName = arenaTypeGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local isSolo = C_PvP.IsSoloShuffle()
                local isThrees = GetNumArenaOpponents() == 3 and C_PvP.IsSoloShuffle() == false
                local isTwos = GetNumArenaOpponents() == 2
                local typeName
                if arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 1 then 
                    typeName = "Solo Shuffle" 
                elseif arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 2 then 
                    typeName = "2v2" 
                elseif arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 3 then 
                    typeName = "3v3" 
                end
                local arenaTypeFound = false
                local should = arenaTypeGroup[i]["should"]
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                
                if isSolo and arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 1 then 
                    arenaTypeFound = true
                elseif isTwos and arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 2 then 
                    arenaTypeFound = true
                elseif isThrees and arenaTypeGroup[i]["arenaType"] == 3 then 
                    arenaTypeFound = true 
                end
                
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    arenaTypeFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and arenaTypeFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. typeName .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and arenaTypeFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. typeName .. " but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local partnerClassGroup = aura_env.config["partnerClassGroup"]
    if partnerClassGroup then
        for i=1, #partnerClassGroup do
            local talentName = partnerClassGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local classID = aura_env.classMap[partnerClassGroup[i]["class"]]
                local should = partnerClassGroup[i]["should"]
                local className = GetClassInfo(classID)
                local classFound = false
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                local oneClassID = _, _, UnitClass("party1")
                local twoClassID = _, _, UnitClass("party2")
                
                if oneClassID == classID or twoClassID == classID then
                    classFound = true
                end
                
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    classFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and classFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. className .. " partner but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and classFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. className .. " partner but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local partnerSpecGroup = aura_env.config["partnerSpecGroup"]
    if partnerSpecGroup then
        for i=1, #partnerSpecGroup do
            local talentName = partnerSpecGroup[i]["talent"]
            if aura_env.CanSpec(talentName) then
                local oneSpecID = GetInspectSpecialization("party1")
                local twoSpecID = GetInspectSpecialization("party2")
                local specID = aura_env.specMap[partnerSpecGroup[i]["spec"]]
                local should = partnerSpecGroup[i]["should"]
                local _, specName = GetSpecializationInfoByID(specID)
                local specFound = false
                local spellFound = aura_env.IsSpecced(talentName)
                
                if oneSpecID == specID or twoSpecID == specID then
                    specFound = true
                end
                
                if event == "OPTIONS" then
                    specFound = true 
                end
                
                if should == 1 and specFound and not spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. specName .. " but missing " .. talentName
                    return true
                elseif should == 2 and specFound and spellFound then
                    aura_env.text = "Found " .. specName .. " but have " .. talentName
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return false
end
